mapper.sql: id, username, password, full_name, phone, email, avatar, role_type, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_code AS roleCode, r.role_name AS roleName, r.description, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.id, p.perm_code AS permCode, p.perm_name AS permName, p.url, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY p.id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.url, p.created_at, p.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, full_name, phone, email, avatar, role_type, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{fullName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{roleType}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET full_name = #{fullName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role_type = #{roleType} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE role_type = #{roleType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
